//: PR P / audit S2 — continuous dependency updates. Written to renovate.json by bootstrap. Enable Renovate (or Dependabot) on the repo; its update PRs flow through pipeline-ci and every normal gate, so an update is verified before it merges. Pairs with scheduled-rescan.yml (which DETECTS new CVEs; Renovate REMEDIATES).
//cooldown: 14d floor aligns with plan-audit's version policy (14-30d minor cooldown); CVE fixes bypass via vulnerabilityAlerts.minimumReleaseAge below (the 0-7d CVE fast path).
//lockfile: Keep lockfiles in sync so lockfile-check.sh (pipeline-ci job 3) stays green.
